Careers

Thinking about a career in insurance? You are at the right place.

We’re growing and it’s an exciting time to work at ICPEI.

We are dedicated to building a warm and exciting environment filled with opportunity and growth, one where employees feel a sense of belonging, and are valued for their contributions and the perspectives they bring. We offer remote and flexible workplace, great benefits, collaborative team of experienced professionals and so much more.
If you find a position that interests you, we encourage you to apply! We’re looking forward to hearing from you.

Job opportunities
Claims Adjuster, Automobiles - Quebec
Permanent Remote
Your role Reporting to the Claims Manager, the Claims Adjuster investigates, evaluates and settles auto claims. What you bring to the position
Bilingual required (French/English)
Minimum 2 years of claims adjusting experience (auto)
AMF permit
Strong oral and written communication skills
Excellent negotiation, analytical and investigative skills
Strong time management, problem solving and organizational skills
Ability to work independently and manage changing priorities
What you will do
Collect and analyze claims information through investigation
Evaluate coverages, exclusions and liability of various auto policies
Maintain timely and accurate records throughout claim handling
